reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) Last year, my husband and I were there when we had an unexpected problem. With the help of the residents, we were able to retrieve the key we had left inside the car. The attendant was super polite, the service at the gas station was excellent, the people were very kind and stopped to help us. There was also an incredible couple and a lady from the baby store who gave us all the support we needed. If you're passing through the city, it's worth getting to know it better.

(Original)
Estive ano passado com meu esposo acabemos tendo imprevisto e com ajuda dos moradores conseguimos retirar a chave havia deixado dentro do carro .. o atendente super educado excelente atendimento do posto pessoas sao humanizadas pararam para nos ajudar nos ajudarão e teve casal incrivel moça da loja de bebe deu todo suporte quem passa pela cidade vale apena conhecer melhor.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16076228542632319706/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21GVGRVOW5Veko0UVRSR1pERlJaVmgzVGxkQlRHYxAB

reviews.comment:
Malisima atención,  te dejan esperando el cambio de turno de playero 15 minutos, no te consultan por control de agua y aceite,  ni hablar de limpiarte parabrisas. Deplorable.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. They make you wait 15 minutes for the attendant to change shifts, they don't ask about checking the water and oil levels, and forget about cleaning your windshield. Deplorable.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16076228542632319706/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xwV01HRlVjMloyWmxwd1FXNVVVRWRKYWpWWE5YYxAB

reviews.comment:
La atención de los empleados es buena, pero para ser un ACA es muy lamentable como está, no pudimos usar beneficio de ACÁ porque no tienen sistema, todo descuidado, los baños, los estacionamientos.
Mejor ir al ypf nuevo de la salida, mejor servicio, más rápido, impecable.

(Translated by Google)
The staff is friendly, but for an ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) it's in a terrible state. We couldn't use our ACA benefits because their system is down, and everything is neglected—the restrooms, the parking lot. It's better to go to the new YPF station near the exit; the service is better, faster, and spotless.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16076228542632319706/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25oMmVGWllNMUZWUWtGRVZVZGhRWEkyYVdWd2VFRRAB

reviews.comment:
La atencion del Full es excelente pero no puedo creer qie haya solo una empleada para hacer los café, las hamburguesas y cobrar en caja.
Y mucho menos siendo fin de semana largo.
Pongas mas empleados!

(Translated by Google)
The service at Full is excellent, but I can't believe there's only one employee making coffee, burgers, and handling the cash register.

Especially on a long weekend. Hire more staff!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16076228542632319706/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xWeVlqVnBXRXBzU0cxRmNuZEpOVXBOTUdGclRsRRAB
